phrases.intent_en: Ask which street has the flagship luxury stores
phrases.text_local: Scusi, qual è la via principale per i negozi di lusso?
phrases.pronunciation: SKOO-zee, kwahl eh lah VEE-ah preen-chee-PAH-leh per ee neh-GOH-tsee dee LOOS-soh?
phrases.cultural_note: Via Montenapoleone is Milan's most exclusive shopping street, home to Gucci, Prada, Versace and other global maisons.

responses.english: Via Montenapoleone, two blocks from here.
responses.phonetic: VEE-ah mon-teh-nah-poh-LEH-oh-neh, ah DOO-eh ee-soh-LAH-tee dah kwee.
responses.local: Via Montenapoleone, a due isolati da qui.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the nearest car park is
phrases.text_local: Buongiorno, dov'è il parcheggio più vicino?
phrases.pronunciation: bwohn-JOHR-noh, doh-VEH eel par-KED-joh PYOO vee-CHEE-noh?

responses.english: On Via Sant'Andrea, underground car park.

phrases.intent_en: Ask if there are sample sale events in this area
phrases.text_local: Scusi, ci sono vendite private o outlet in questa zona?
phrases.pronunciation: SKOO-zee, chee SOH-noh ven-DEE-teh pree-VAH-teh oh OUT-let een KWES-tah DZOH-nah?

responses.english: Sometimes yes, check online or in the stores themselves.
responses.phonetic: ah VOL-teh see, veh-REE-fee-kee on-LEE-neh oh nay neh-GOH-tsee STES-see.
responses.local: A volte sì, verifichi online o nei negozi stessi.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the nearest metro stop is
phrases.text_local: Buongiorno, qual è la fermata della metropolitana più vicina?
phrases.pronunciation: bwohn-JOHR-noh, kwahl eh lah fer-MAH-tah DEL-lah meh-troh-poh-lee-TAH-nah PYOO vee-CHEE-nah?

responses.phonetic: mon-teh-nah-poh-LEH-oh-neh, LEE-neh-ah treh, ah DOO-eh mee-NOO-tee.
responses.local: Montenapoleone, linea tre, a due minuti.

phrases.intent_en: Ask if the luxury stores allow you to browse freely
phrases.text_local: Scusi, si può entrare a guardare senza acquistare?
phrases.pronunciation: SKOO-zee, see PWOH en-TRAH-reh ah gwar-DAH-reh SEN-tsah ak-kwees-TAH-reh?

responses.english: Yes, in flagship stores you can enter freely.
responses.phonetic: see, nay flag-ship store see EN-trah lee-beh-rah-MEN-teh.
responses.local: Sì, nei flagship store si entra liberamente.
